FoodDrink: Edible or drinkable products. Usually packaged food, snacks, condiments, powders, bottles, cans, jars, cups, or frozen food packages. Including: milk powder, Biscuits, Cake, Can, Carbonated drinks, Chewing gum, Chocolates, Cocktail, Coffee, Cooking wine, Dairy, Dried beans, Dried fish, Dried meat, Fish tofu, Flour, Ginger Tea, Guozhen, Herbal tea, Hot strips, Ice cream, Instant noodles, Liquor and Spirits, Lotus root flour, Mixed congee, Noodle, Oats, Pasta, Pie, Potato chips, Quick-frozen dumplings, Quick-frozen Tangyuan, Quick-frozen Wonton, Red wine, Rice, Rise, Sauce, Sesame paste, Sour Plum Soup, Soy sauce, Soymilk, Tea, Tea beverage, Vinegar, Walnut powder.
Appliance: Powered electrical devices or machines. Usually has plugs, buttons, vents, screens, handles, or mechanical structure. Including: Air conditioner, Air conditioning fan, Desk lamp, Electric fan, Electric frying pan, Electric Hot pot, Electric iron, Electric kettle, Electric steaming pan, Electromagnetic furnace, Hair drier, Juicer, Microwave Oven, Refrigerator, Rice cooker, Television, Washing machine.
PersonalCare: Hygiene, beauty, skincare, haircare, oral care, feminine care, or medical-use products. Usually bottles, tubes, sachets, or care kits. Including: Band aid, Bath lotion, Care Kit, Cotton swab, Emulsion, Facial Cleanser, Facial mask, Hair conditioner, Hair dye, Hair gel, Makeup tools, Mouth wash, Razor, Shampoo, Skin care set, Soap, Tampon, Toothbrush, Toothpaste.
ClothingWear: Wearable items made of fabric or footwear materials, such as clothes, hats, shoes, socks, underwear, and diapers. Focus on textile and leather goods. Including: Diapers, Hat, Jacket, Lingerie, Shoes, Socks, Trousers, Underwear.
BabyProduct: Baby-specific products such as stroller, crib, baby furniture, baby feeding items, baby care items, and toys. Focused on infants and toddlers. Including: Baby carriage, Baby crib, Baby Furniture, Baby handkerchiefs, Baby tableware, Baby washing and nursing supplie, Toys.
Kitchenware: Non-powered tools for food prep and service. Bowls, plates, cups, utensils, bottles, food containers, serving items, and kitchen storage items. Usually made of ceramic, glass, or stainless steel. Including: Basin, Bowl, Chopping block, Chopsticks, Dinner plate, Disposable cups, Food box, Forks, Fresh-keeping film, Knives, Mug, Pot shovel, Soup ladle, Spoon, Sports cup, Storage bottle, Storage box, Thermos bottle.
HouseholdOther: General utility items, stationery, and home organization. Sockets, hangers, bags, stationery, stools, trash bins, or storage products. Including: Bedding set, Coat hanger, Comb, Cutter, Disposable bag, Draw bar box, Knapsack, Notebook, Pen, Pencil case, Socket, Stool, Trash.
Sports: Sports or play equipment such as balls, rackets, skate, and recreational items. Focus on physical activity and games. Including: Badminton, Basketball, Football, Rubber ball, Skate.
